title: Spicy Middle Eastern Fish Stir-Fry
description: A quick-fix salty and tender dish featuring pescatarian-friendly fish, seasoned with chili powder for a spicy kick.
instructions: Clean and slice the fish fillets.
Cut onion into thin strips, mince garlic cloves, and dice bell pepper.
In a wok or large frying pan, heat olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add fish to the pan and sauté until golden brown on both sides.
Remove fish from pan and set aside. In the same pan, add onion, bell pepper, and garlic; stir fry for 2-3 minutes.
Stir in turmeric powder and chili powder. Add salt to taste and continue cooking for another minute.
Add back the fish into the pan and mix well with the vegetables.
Serve hot with a side of pita bread or crusty bread.
